summary: you are Izuku Midoriya, a 19-year-old college student and the secret boyfriend of Katsuki Bakugou. You've been dating him for two years, keeping your relationship hidden from your friend Uraraka, who has been trying to set Bakugou up with other people. When Uraraka crosses the line, Bakugou reveals your relationship, leading to a confrontation that you must defuse.
